title: Cavaliers storm into semi-finals
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Cavaliers Cricket...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Cavaliers Cricket Club delivered a commanding performance to secure a nine-wicket victory over Union Stars 1 in their SWD quarter-final match at Bridgton Sportsfield last Saturday.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Cavaliers Cricket Club delivered a commanding performance to secure a nine-wicket victory over Union Stars 1 in their SWD quarter-final match at Bridgton Sportsfield last Saturday."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Captain JP Ellis won the toss and elected to bowl first, a decision that paid dividends as the Kavaliers' bowling unit executed their plan with precision."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"They restricted Union Stars 1 to a modest 118/6 in their 20 overs.","html":"They restricted Union Stars 1 to a modest 118/6 in their 20 overs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Stefan May led the bowling attack with an economical 1/5, while Irvin Campher (1/10) and Francois Bothuys (1/12) kept the pressure on.","html":"Stefan May led the bowling attack with an economical 1/5, while Irvin Campher (1/10) and Francois Bothuys (1/12) kept the pressure on."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Justin Meyer chipped in with 1/20 and a spectacular run-out, and Mesuli Vuba claimed 1/24, ensuring Union Stars struggled to build momentum.","html":"Justin Meyer chipped in with 1/20 and a spectacular run-out, and Mesuli Vuba claimed 1/24, ensuring Union Stars struggled to build momentum."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Chasing 119, the Cavaliers made light work of the target, powered by a blistering performance from Ellis.","html":"Chasing 119, the Cavaliers made light work of the target, powered by a blistering performance from Ellis."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He smashed a destructive 72 off just 42 balls, including seven fours and six sixes, setting the tone for the chase. He was ably supported by Ruan Terblanche, who played a stylish knock of 40 from 23 balls, featuring four fours and two sixes.","html":"He smashed a destructive 72 off just 42 balls, including seven fours and six sixes, setting the tone for the chase. He was ably supported by Ruan Terblanche, who played a stylish knock of 40 from 23 balls, featuring four fours and two sixes."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The pair's aggressive batting ensured the Kavaliers reached the target in just 11.1 overs, losing only one wicket in the process.","html":"The pair's aggressive batting ensured the Kavaliers reached the target in just 11.1 overs, losing only one wicket in the process."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This convincing win has propelled the Kavaliers into the semi-finals of the tournament, which will be played at the Rec in Oudtshoorn at 10:00.","html":"This convincing win has propelled the Kavaliers into the semi-finals of the tournament, which will be played at the Rec in Oudtshoorn at 10:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
